title: Compliance control row
description: Schema enforced on every row of every compliance/controls/<framework>.csv. tools/compliance/coverage.sh validates each row against this schema. TASK-P0-COMP-001 (PR-G).

control_id.description: Stable identifier from the upstream framework. Examples: ISO27001 'A.5.1', NIST '800-53 AC-2', GDPR 'Art.30', 22 CFR '120.10', CERT-In 'i'.

title.description: Short human-readable summary. Verbatim from the framework where licensing permits.

owner.description: Internal team accountable for the control implementation + evidence (e.g. 'Platform IAM', 'Security', 'Compliance').

evidence_path.description: Repo-relative path to the evidence artefact (code, policy doc, audit report, dashboard JSON). Empty string is permitted in Phase 0/1; coverage.sh reports it as 'pending'. From Phase 6 onward (TASK-P6-COMP-001) coverage.sh is strict and rejects empty values.

status.description: Lifecycle state. 'exception' requires a non-empty notes field justifying the deviation. 'blocked' indicates an external dependency (typically an OQ-NNN open question in plan/requirements.md §9).

phase.description: Optional planning phase tag. P0..P6 maps to plan/todo.md phases; v1.x / v2.0 / v2.1 reflect the staggered-cert calendar in plan/requirements.md §5.
